content.rendered:
I really don’t have much of an update to share with everyone. I’m still in the hospital in Duluth, fighting with vomiting. Everytime I eat something, it’ll eventually come back up because of the various blockages I have in my abdomen region. It hasn’t been pleasant but at least here in the hospital setting, someone is watching me 24/7 when I do puke.

As of right now, I’m on a liquid only diet trying to calm the bowels down. They’re also feeding me through my port line (pretty much a feeding tube at this point). It’s a continuous 24/7 feed going into me. I don’t taste it or anything really except when they start and stop it, I do taste a little vanilla from it.

A new surgeon took over the case today and he ordered some XRays of my chest and abdomen to figure out the weird blockage I feel up there and get, basically, new pictures since surgery. Maybe something will stand out and they can fix me swiftly, that would be the best case scenario.

Other than that, not a whole lot is new, just trying to get over this latest hump so I can truly head home and recover. Thanks everyone for reading this and your kind thoughts as always, it means a lot to me!

excerpt.rendered: I really don’t have much of an update to share
